name: tg-antispam
description: Telegram 群组 AI 反垃圾广告机器人

scripts.obfuscate:release:test: javascript-obfuscator release/app.bundle.cjs --output release/app.protected.cjs --compact true --string-array true --string-array-threshold 0.75 --rename-globals false --self-defending false --source-map false
scripts.obfuscate:release:test:buyer: javascript-obfuscator release/app.bundle.buyer.cjs --output release/app.protected.buyer.cjs --compact true --string-array true --string-array-threshold 0.75 --rename-globals false --self-defending false --source-map false
scripts.release:test: npm run build:release && npm run bundle:release:test && npm run obfuscate:release:test
scripts.release:test:buyer: npm run build:release && npm run bundle:release:test:buyer && npm run obfuscate:release:test:buyer
